scripts.deploy:all: wrangler deploy && wrangler deploy --env daisy && wrangler deploy --env sigma
scripts.db:migrate:daisy: wrangler d1 migrations apply daisy-ai-bot-db --env daisy
scripts.db:migrate:sigma: wrangler d1 migrations apply sigma-ai-bot-db --env sigma
scripts.db:migrate:all: wrangler d1 migrations apply my-ai-bot-db && wrangler d1 migrations apply daisy-ai-bot-db --env daisy && wrangler d1 migrations apply sigma-ai-bot-db --env sigma
